1: /// One upstream ancestor branch and its PR info (if any).
2: pub struct AncestorPr {
3:     pub branch: String,
4:     pub pr_number: Option<u64>,
5:     pub pr_url: Option<String>, // pre-resolved, e.g. "https://github.com/org/repo/pull/42"
6: }
7: 
8: /// Returns the markdown stack section, or None if no ancestors have a PR number.
9: /// Ancestors are expected in trunk-closest-first order.
10: /// Only ancestors with a pr_number are listed; ancestors without one are skipped.
11: pub fn build_stack_section(ancestors: &[AncestorPr]) -> Option<String> {
12:     let linked: Vec<String> = ancestors
13:         .iter()
14:         .filter_map(|a| a.pr_number.map(|num| (a, num)))
15:         .enumerate()
16:         .map(|(i, (a, num))| match &a.pr_url {
17:             Some(url) => format!("{}. [{} #{}]({})", i + 1, a.branch, num, url),
18:             None => format!("{}. {} #{}", i + 1, a.branch, num),
19:         })
20:         .collect();
21: 
22:     if linked.is_empty() {
23:         None
24:     } else {
25:         Some(format!("**Stack:**\n{}", linked.join("\n")))
26:     }
27: }
28: 
29: /// Returns the full PR body: user_body, then (if any ancestors have PRs) a
30: /// separator and the stack section appended.
31: pub fn build_stack_body(ancestors: &[AncestorPr], user_body: &str) -> String {
32:     match build_stack_section(ancestors) {
33:         Some(section) => format!("{}\n\n---\n\n{}", user_body, section),
34:         None => user_body.to_string(),
35:     }
36: }
37: 
38: #[cfg(test)]
39: mod tests {
40:     use super::*;

42:     fn anc(branch: &str, number: Option<u64>, url: Option<&str>) -> AncestorPr {
43:         AncestorPr {
44:             branch: branch.to_string(),
45:             pr_number: number,
46:             pr_url: url.map(|s| s.to_string()),
47:         }
48:     }

50:     // --- build_stack_section ---
51: 
52:     #[test]
53:     fn section_empty_ancestors_returns_none() {
54:         assert!(build_stack_section(&[]).is_none());
55:     }
56:

58:     fn section_ancestor_without_pr_returns_none() {

60:         assert!(build_stack_section(&ancestors).is_none());

70:         let section = build_stack_section(&ancestors).unwrap();
